title: Process Engineer Vacancy at LG Electronics India Ventures Solutions - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Process Engineer Vacancy at LG Electronics India Ventures Solutions - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
We at LG Electronics India Ventures Solutions are looking for an experienced Process Engineer based out of Vijayawada. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About LG Electronics India Ventures Solutions:
LG Electronics India Ventures Solutions is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Implement 5S, Kaizen, and Six Sigma practices on the shop floor
• Train and supervise shop floor workers and supervisors
• Oversee daily production operations to meet output targets
• Conduct root cause analysis for quality rejections and defects
• Ensure product quality meets internal and customer specifications
• Manage supplier quality audits and vendor development
• Ensure compliance with safety regulations and factory acts

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in PLC/SCADA
• Proficiency in TPM
• Proficiency in Quality Control
• Proficiency in GD&T
• Proficiency in ERP Systems
• Proficiency in ISO 9001
• Proficiency in Root Cause Analysis
• Proficiency in SolidWorks

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Life and accident insurance
• Referral bonus program
• Flexible working hours
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Vijayawada, Andhra Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with LG Electronics India Ventures Solutions!
